title: Oversee humane handling of animals
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Oversee humane handling of animals demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Oversee humane handling of animals

pcs.text: Identify animal welfare requirements in legislation, regulation and workplace procedures
